calendar.matters:
Report Of Sale Perition For Order Confirming Sale Of Real Property.
Off Calendar Feb-26-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Miguel Rodis for Raymond Levy (Trustee).

The sale was confirmed at $580,000.00. The Court granted the petition (subject to the written order).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy D. Sum.
